text: Full OpenTelemetry pipeline on .NET 11 against a free backend: OpenTelemetry.Exporter.OpenTelemetryProtocol 1.15.3, WithTracing/WithMetrics/WithLogging plus UseOtlpExporter, and the standalone Aspire Dashboard for traces, metrics, and structured logs in one UI. Plus the gRPC vs HTTP default trap that bites Framework bridges.
